title: PriceAlert
description: A price alert set by the user on a financial instrument

alertId.description: Unique identifier of the price alert

instrumentId.description: Unique instrument identifier used across all trading operations

symbol.description: Trading symbol displayed to users (e.g. AAPL, TSLA)

targetPrice.description: Target price at which the alert will trigger

currentPrice.description: Market bid price at the time the alert was created or last updated

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the alert was created (ISO 8601 UTC)

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the alert was last updated (ISO 8601 UTC)
